description_long: This is a classic wooden barrel with a slightly bulging cylindrical shape, constructed from vertical wooden staves held together by five dark metal hoops. The wood has a weathered, medium-brown appearance with visible grain and subtle textural variations, suggesting age and outdoor exposure. The metal bands are evenly spaced and riveted, providing structural reinforcement and a rustic aesthetic. The top and bottom surfaces are flat and made of the same wood, with the top appearing tightly sealed. Some faint markings and text are visible on the side, adding to its utilitarian character. The overall build and finish suggest it is designed for storage or transport of liquids or dry goods in urban or industrial settings.
description: A weathered wooden barrel with dark metal hoops and faint side markings, featuring a classic bulging shape and rustic finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the barrel's bulging shape, wood grain, and three prominent metal hoops with rivets.
description_view_1: This side highlights the curvature and texture of the wood, with the metal hoops appearing slightly more worn.
description_view_2: Another side view with visible wood grain and metal bands, showing subtle differences in the wood's coloration.
description_view_3: This view reveals faint text markings ('DECK') and a small circular marking on the side, along with the metal hoops.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: faint text ('DECK') and small circular marking
